title: Indistractable
subtitle: How to Control Your Attention and Choose Your Life
author: Nir Eyal
themes: Distraction is an internal problem, not an external one
Traction vs Distraction as the master distinction
Timeboxing every minute of the day
External triggers can be hacked back
Precommitment and pacts as behavioral safeguards
excerpt: You sit down to work on something important. Three minutes later, your phone buzzes. You check it. You're distracted. Sound familiar? Indistractable reveals the hidden psychology driving us to distraction and provides a four-step framework to regain control — starting with the uncomfortable truth that the source of distraction is usually inside us, not in our devices.
